features.name: documentation

flows.name: stream-server-sent-events
flows.description: Developer defines a path operation that yields ServerSentEvent objects using EventSourceResponse to push real-time updates to clients over HTTP.

flows.name: serve-openapi-docs
flows.description: User navigates to the auto-generated Swagger UI or ReDoc interactive API documentation served by the FastAPI application.

flows.name: declare-dependencies
flows.description: Developer declares injected dependencies (query params, headers, body fields, security schemes) on path operation functions using Depends and parameter helper functions.

flows.name: upload-file
flows.description: User uploads a file to an endpoint that accepts multipart form data via FastAPI's UploadFile datastructure.

flows.name: define-http-route-flow
flows.description: Developer registers an HTTP endpoint with a path, method, and handler function using APIRouter or FastAPI app.

flows.name: define-websocket-route-flow
flows.description: Developer registers a WebSocket endpoint and handles bidirectional communication sessions.

flows.name: include-router-flow
flows.description: Developer organises routes into modular APIRouter instances and includes them in the main application.

flows.name: serialize-response-flow
flows.description: Framework serializes the endpoint return value into a JSON-compatible HTTP response using response models.

flows.name: generate-operation-id-flow
flows.description: Framework auto-generates unique operation IDs for each route to power OpenAPI documentation.

flows.name: declare-dependency-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Depends() to declare a callable dependency on an endpoint or another dependency.

flows.name: resolve-dependency-tree-flow
flows.description: Framework walks the dependency graph and resolves all nested dependencies before calling the endpoint.

flows.name: scope-dependency-lifetime-flow
flows.description: Developer controls whether a dependency is resolved once per request or shared across sub-dependencies.

flows.name: use-context-manager-dependency-flow
flows.description: Developer writes a generator-based dependency with setup and teardown logic using yield.

flows.name: inject-multipart-dependency-flow
flows.description: Framework ensures multipart form parsing libraries are installed when file or form dependencies are declared.

flows.name: declare-path-parameter-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Path() to declare a typed, validated path segment with constraints such as min/max.

flows.name: declare-query-parameter-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Query() to declare optional or required query string parameters with validation rules.

flows.name: declare-request-body-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Body() or a Pydantic model to declare a structured JSON request body with schema validation.

flows.name: declare-form-and-file-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Form() and File() or UploadFile to accept multipart form data and file uploads.

flows.name: declare-header-and-cookie-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Header() and Cookie() to extract and validate HTTP headers and cookies.

flows.name: validate-request-flow
flows.description: Framework validates path, query, header, body, and cookie values against declared types and constraints.

flows.name: handle-validation-error-flow
flows.description: Framework catches RequestValidationError and returns a 422 response with field-level error details.

flows.name: handle-http-exception-flow
flows.description: Developer raises HTTPException with a status code and detail; framework returns the appropriate error response.

flows.name: handle-websocket-validation-error-flow
flows.description: Framework catches WebSocket validation errors and closes the connection with an appropriate error message.

flows.name: customize-exception-handler-flow
flows.description: Developer registers a custom exception handler to override default error response formatting.

flows.name: encode-response-object-flow
flows.description: Framework uses jsonable_encoder to convert Pydantic models, datetimes, decimals, and enums to JSON-safe types.

flows.name: use-ujson-response-flow
flows.description: Developer selects UJSONResponse or ORJSONResponse for faster JSON serialization on high-throughput endpoints.

flows.name: filter-response-fields-flow
flows.description: Framework applies response_model include/exclude rules to strip fields before serializing the response.

flows.name: return-custom-response-flow
flows.description: Developer returns a custom Response subclass directly from an endpoint to control headers and media type.

flows.name: add-background-task-flow
flows.description: Developer injects BackgroundTasks and calls add_task() inside an endpoint to queue a function for post-response execution.

flows.name: run-background-task-flow
flows.description: Framework executes all queued background tasks after the response is sent to the client.

flows.name: pass-background-tasks-via-dependency-flow
flows.display_name: Pass Background Tasks Via Dependency Flow
flows.description: Developer passes BackgroundTasks through a dependency so shared logic can also enqueue tasks.

flows.name: create-sse-endpoint-flow
flows.description: Developer returns an EventSourceResponse from an endpoint to open a persistent SSE stream to the client.

flows.name: send-sse-event-flow
flows.description: Developer yields ServerSentEvent objects with data, event type, and ID fields to push updates to the client.

flows.name: format-sse-event-flow
flows.description: Framework formats a ServerSentEvent into the text/event-stream wire format before writing it to the response.

flows.name: connect-websocket-flow
flows.description: Client initiates a WebSocket handshake and the server accepts the connection on a declared WebSocket route.

flows.name: receive-websocket-message-flow
flows.description: Server reads text or binary messages sent by the connected client during an active WebSocket session.

flows.name: configure-lifespan-flow
flows.description: Developer provides a lifespan async context manager to run startup and shutdown logic around the app's lifetime.

flows.name: mount-sub-application-flow
flows.description: Developer mounts a sub-application or static files handler at a path prefix within the main FastAPI app.

flows.name: configure-middleware-flow
flows.description: Developer adds CORS, GZip, or custom ASGI middleware to the application to process every request and response.

flows.name: run-cli-flow
flows.description: Developer starts the FastAPI development server from the command line using the built-in CLI entry point.

flows.name: generate-openapi-schema-flow
flows.description: Framework introspects all registered routes and produces a complete OpenAPI 3.x JSON schema.

flows.name: view-swagger-ui-flow
flows.description: Developer or API consumer opens /docs in a browser to explore and try out endpoints interactively.

flows.name: customize-openapi-metadata-flow
flows.description: Developer sets title, version, description, and tags on the FastAPI app to enrich the generated OpenAPI document.

flows.name: mount-static-files-flow
flows.description: Developer mounts a StaticFiles instance at a path to serve CSS, JS, and image assets directly from disk.

flows.name: serve-html-page-flow
flows.description: Client requests an HTML page and the server returns a fully rendered Jinja2 template with dynamic content.

flows.name: send-test-request-flow
flows.description: Developer uses TestClient to send HTTP requests to the app in tests without running a live server.

flows.name: override-dependency-in-test-flow
flows.description: Developer uses app.dependency_overrides to replace real dependencies with test doubles during testing.

flows.name: register-http-route
flows.description: Developer registers an HTTP endpoint (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.) on the FastAPI application or router using decorator-based path operations.

flows.name: register-websocket-route
flows.description: Developer registers a WebSocket endpoint on the FastAPI application or router to handle real-time bidirectional connections.

flows.name: manage-items-flow
flows.description: CRUD operations for items including list, create, read, update, and delete.

flows.name: list-users-flow
flows.description: Retrieve all users from the system.

flows.name: user-items-flow
flows.description: Retrieve items belonging to the authenticated user.

flows.name: get-item-flow
flows.description: Retrieve a single item by ID.

flows.name: path-validation-flow
flows.description: Test path parameter validation with various type and constraint combinations.

flows.name: path-param-validation-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints validating integer path parameters with various constraints (gt, ge, lt, le).

flows.name: query-param-validation-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints validating query parameters with optional, required, typed, and list variants.

flows.name: response-class-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints using custom response classes for multiple routes.

flows.name: router-response-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints demonstrating response models across multiple router paths.

flows.name: dependency-cache-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for dependency caching behavior across request scopes.

flows.name: callable-dependency-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for callable class and method dependency injection patterns.

flows.name: context-manager-dependency-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for context manager dependency injection with error handling.

flows.name: dependency-override-flow
flows.description: Test routes for dependency override patterns across decorators and routers.

flows.name: partial-dependency-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for partial function dependency injection with sync/async and generator variants.

flows.name: wrapped-dependency-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for wrapped dependency injection with various sync/async and generator combinations.

flows.name: user-update-flow
flows.description: Update user records with database dependency handling.

flows.name: exception-handling-flow
flows.description: Test HTTP exception and error handling across multiple scenarios.

flows.name: file-form-upload-flow
flows.description: Handle multipart file and form data submission with various ordering and list scenarios.

flows.name: form-submission-flow
flows.description: Handle URL-encoded and multipart form data submissions.

flows.name: form-list-param-flow
flows.description: Handle form submissions with list parameters from various sequence types.

flows.name: form-model-flow
flows.description: Handle form submissions with Pydantic model validation and extra field handling.

flows.name: json-type-handling-flow
flows.description: Handle JSON type data in form, query, header, and cookie parameters.

flows.name: openapi-examples-flow
flows.description: Demonstrate OpenAPI examples in path, query, header, and cookie parameters.

flows.name: separate-schemas-flow
flows.description: Separate input and output schemas for item creation and retrieval.

flows.name: hidden-params-flow
flows.description: Access endpoints with hidden cookie, header, path, and query parameters.

flows.name: pydantic-v1-validation-flow
flows.description: Test error handling for Pydantic v1 models in various endpoint contexts.

flows.name: model-params-flow
flows.description: Access endpoints with query, header, and cookie model parameters.

flows.name: cookie-management-flow
flows.description: Set and manage cookies via direct and indirect routes.

flows.name: request-param-model-flow
flows.description: Validate and parse request parameters (query, header, cookie) using model aliases.

flows.name: response-alias-flow
flows.description: Serialize responses with field aliases in various formats (dict, model, list).

flows.name: serialize-items-flow
flows.description: Retrieve and serialize item responses with various validation modes.

flows.name: stream-items-flow
flows.description: Server-sent events and streaming endpoints for item data in various formats.

flows.name: url-convertor-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for Starlette URL path parameter type conversion.

flows.name: stream-bare-type-flow
flows.description: Streaming endpoints with bare type annotations in async and sync variants.

flows.name: stream-validation-flow
flows.description: Stream JSON responses with validation error handling.

flows.name: stringified-annotation-flow
flows.description: Handle stringified type annotations and forward references.

flows.name: invoice-callbacks-flow
flows.description: Create invoices with webhook callback notifications.

flows.name: tuple-models-flow
flows.description: Handle tuple types in request bodies and forms.

flows.name: union-body-flow
flows.description: Accept union types in request bodies.

flows.name: response-validation-flow
flows.description: Validate response models and handle validation errors.

flows.name: upsert-item-flow
flows.description: Create or update an item by ID.

flows.name: update-item-flow
flows.description: Update an existing item.

flows.name: create-item-flow
flows.description: Create a new item.

flows.name: send-notification-flow
flows.description: Send a notification email with background task processing.

flows.name: manage-item-flow
flows.description: Retrieve and update item with partial updates via PATCH.

flows.name: read-user-flow
flows.description: Retrieve user information by username.

flows.name: list-items-with-cookies-flow
flows.description: List items with cookie-based parameters.

flows.name: serve-docs-ui-flow
flows.description: Serve custom documentation UI endpoints (Swagger, ReDoc, and user endpoints).

flows.name: compute-sum-flow
flows.description: Accept gzip-compressed POST requests to compute sums.

flows.name: timed-request-flow
flows.description: Measure and track request execution time.

flows.name: redirect-flow
flows.description: Handle HTTP redirects to external resources.

flows.name: stream-video-flow
flows.description: Stream video content as a response.

flows.name: common-parameters-flow
flows.description: Shared query parameters for items and users listing.

flows.name: list-items-flow
flows.description: Retrieve item listings with optional header parameters and metadata.

flows.name: manage-invoices-flow
flows.description: Create invoices and handle callback notifications for invoice events.

flows.name: get-item-by-id-flow
flows.description: Retrieve a specific item by its identifier.

flows.name: get-user-profile-flow
flows.description: Retrieve current user profile and user details by identifier.

flows.name: get-file-flow
flows.description: Retrieve a file by its path.

flows.name: get-model-flow
flows.description: Retrieve a model by its name.

flows.name: retrieve-items-flow
flows.description: Fetch items by ID with numeric path parameter validation.

flows.name: create-items-flow
flows.description: Create new items with Pydantic v1 compatibility validation.

flows.name: filter-items-flow
flows.description: List items with query parameter filtering and model-based validation.

flows.name: search-items-flow
flows.description: Search and retrieve items with string query parameter validation.

flows.name: upload-files-flow
flows.description: Handle file and upload file submissions.

flows.name: upload-file-flow
flows.description: Handle single file upload to server.

flows.name: upload-form-file-flow
flows.description: Handle form submission with file upload.

flows.name: read-items-flow
flows.description: Retrieve items for authenticated users.

flows.name: chat-stream-flow
flows.description: Streaming chat endpoint for real-time message responses.

flows.name: manage-heroes-flow
flows.description: CRUD operations for hero records in SQL database.

flows.name: stream-story-flow
flows.description: Server-sent event streaming of story content with multiple implementation variants.

flows.name: stream-image-flow
flows.description: Stream PNG image data with multiple implementation variants.

flows.name: websocket-chat-flow
flows.description: Establish WebSocket connections for real-time communication.

flows.name: validate-list-body-flow
flows.description: Validate and process required list body parameters with various alias configurations.

flows.name: validate-optional-list-body-flow
flows.description: Validate and process optional list body parameters with various alias configurations.

flows.name: validate-optional-str-body-flow
flows.description: Validate and process optional string body parameters with various alias configurations.

bug_fix_prs.title: 📝 Fix duplicated words in docstrings (#15116)

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix, avoid yield from a TaskGroup, only as an async context manager, closed in the request async exit stack (#15038)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix JSON Schema for files, use `contentMediaType` instead of `format: binary` (#14953)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: ✨ Show a clear error on attempt to include router into itself (#14258)
bug_fix_prs.author: Javier Sánchez Castro

bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix using `Json[list[str]]` type (issue #10997) (#14616)
bug_fix_prs.author: Kanetsuna Masaya

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix TYPE_CHECKING annotations for Python 3.14 (PEP 649) (#14789)
bug_fix_prs.author: Mickaël Guérin

bug_fix_prs.title: 🚸 Improve error message for invalid query parameter type annotations (#14479)
bug_fix_prs.author: Anton

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix OpenAPI duplication of `anyOf` refs for app-level responses with specified `content` and `model` as `Union` (#1446

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix parameter aliases (#14371)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix support for tagged union with discriminator inside of `Annotated` with `Body()` (#14512)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix support for `if TYPE_CHECKING`,  non-evaluated stringified annotations (#14485)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix handling arbitrary types when using `arbitrary_types_allowed=True` (#14482)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix using class (not instance) dependency that has `__call__` method (#14458)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix `separate_input_output_schemas=False` with `computed_field` (#14453)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix OAuth2 scopes in OpenAPI in extra corner cases, parent dependency with scopes, sub-dependency security scheme with
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix OpenAPI security scheme OAuth2 scopes declaration, deduplicate security schemes with different scopes (#14455)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix evaluating stringified annotations in Python 3.10 (#11355)
bug_fix_prs.author: chaen

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix support for functools wraps and partial combined, for async and regular functions and classes in path operations a
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix optional sequence handling with new union syntax from Python 3.10 (#14430)
bug_fix_prs.author: Victorien

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix OpenAPI schema support for computed fields when using `separate_input_output_schemas=False` (#13207)
bug_fix_prs.author: Vincent Grafé

bug_fix_prs.title: 📝 Fix docstring of `servers` parameter (#14405)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix Query\Header\Cookie parameter model alias (#14360)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix optional sequence handling in `serialize sequence value` with Pydantic V2 (#14297)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix unformatted `{type_}` in FastAPIError (#14416)
bug_fix_prs.author: Alex Colby

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix parsing extra non-body parameter list (#14356)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix parsing extra `Form` parameter list (#14303)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix support for form values with empty strings interpreted as missing (`None` if that's the default), for compatibilit
bug_fix_prs.author: ad hoc

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix `TypeError` when encoding a decimal with a `NaN` or `Infinity` value (#12935)
bug_fix_prs.author: Kent Huang

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix hierarchical security scope propagation (#5624)
bug_fix_prs.author: Kristján Valur Jónsson

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix handling of JSON Schema attributes named "$ref" (#14349)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix `Depends(func, scope='function')` for top level (parameterless) dependencies (#14301)
bug_fix_prs.author: luzzodev

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix security schemes in OpenAPI when added at the top level app (#14266)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix separation of schemas with nested models introduced in 0.119.0 (#14246)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix internal Pydantic v1 compatibility (warnings) for Python 3.14 and Pydantic 2.12.1 (#14186)
bug_fix_prs.author: Sofie Van Landeghem

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix tagged discriminated union not recognized as body field (#12942)
bug_fix_prs.author: François Voron

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix support for `StreamingResponse`s with dependencies with `yield` or `UploadFile`s, close after the response is done
bug_fix_prs.author: Sebastián Ramírez

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix validation error when `File` is declared after `Form` parameter (#11194)
bug_fix_prs.author: Thomas LÉVEIL

bug_fix_prs.title: ⚡️ Fix `default_factory` for response model field with Pydantic V1 (#9704)
bug_fix_prs.author: vvanglro

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix inconsistent processing of model docstring formfeed char with Pydantic V1 (#6039)
bug_fix_prs.author: Max McLennan

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix `jsonable_encoder` alters `json_encoders` of Pydantic v1 objects (#4972)
bug_fix_prs.author: Salim Aboubacar

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix `inspect.getcoroutinefunction()` can break testing with `unittest.mock.patch()` (#14022)
bug_fix_prs.author: secrett2633

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix support for unions when using `Form` (#13827)
bug_fix_prs.author: Patrick Arminio

bug_fix_prs.title: 🐛 Fix truncating the model's description with form feed (`\f`) character for Pydantic V2 (#13698)
bug_fix_prs.author: Motov Yurii

features.name: auth
features.description: Authentication and account access — sign-in, sign-up, password recovery, email verification, session management.

flows.name: authenticate-with-oauth2-password
flows.description: User submits username and password as form data to obtain an OAuth2 bearer token via the password flow.

flows.name: get-current-user-flow
flows.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information across various security schemes.

flows.name: oauth2-login-flow
flows.description: OAuth2 user login endpoint.

flows.name: oauth2-token-endpoint-flow
flows.description: OAuth2 token endpoint and documentation routes for authorization code flow.

flows.name: current-user-retrieval-flow
flows.description: Fetch authenticated user profile across multiple security schemes.

flows.name: verify-token-flow
flows.description: Validate authentication token for protected endpoints.

flows.name: manage-users-flow
flows.description: User creation and account management.

flows.name: form-login-flow
flows.description: Handle user login via form submission.

flows.name: authenticate-flow
flows.description: User login and token acquisition.

flows.name: read-current-user-flow
flows.description: Retrieve authenticated user profile information.

flows.name: api-key-auth-flow
flows.description: Authenticate requests using API key credentials.

flows.name: http-basic-auth-flow
flows.description: Authenticate requests using HTTP Basic credentials.

flows.name: stream-server-sent-events
flows.description: Developer defines a path operation that yields ServerSentEvent objects using EventSourceResponse to push real-time updates to clients over HTTP.

flows.name: serve-openapi-docs
flows.description: User navigates to the auto-generated Swagger UI or ReDoc interactive API documentation served by the FastAPI application.

flows.name: declare-dependencies
flows.description: Developer declares injected dependencies (query params, headers, body fields, security schemes) on path operation functions using Depends and parameter helper functions.

flows.name: upload-file
flows.description: User uploads a file to an endpoint that accepts multipart form data via FastAPI's UploadFile datastructure.

flows.name: define-http-route-flow
flows.description: Developer registers an HTTP endpoint with a path, method, and handler function using APIRouter or FastAPI app.

flows.name: define-websocket-route-flow
flows.description: Developer registers a WebSocket endpoint and handles bidirectional communication sessions.

flows.name: include-router-flow
flows.description: Developer organises routes into modular APIRouter instances and includes them in the main application.

flows.name: serialize-response-flow
flows.description: Framework serializes the endpoint return value into a JSON-compatible HTTP response using response models.

flows.name: generate-operation-id-flow
flows.description: Framework auto-generates unique operation IDs for each route to power OpenAPI documentation.

flows.name: declare-dependency-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Depends() to declare a callable dependency on an endpoint or another dependency.

flows.name: resolve-dependency-tree-flow
flows.description: Framework walks the dependency graph and resolves all nested dependencies before calling the endpoint.

flows.name: scope-dependency-lifetime-flow
flows.description: Developer controls whether a dependency is resolved once per request or shared across sub-dependencies.

flows.name: use-context-manager-dependency-flow
flows.description: Developer writes a generator-based dependency with setup and teardown logic using yield.

flows.name: inject-multipart-dependency-flow
flows.description: Framework ensures multipart form parsing libraries are installed when file or form dependencies are declared.

flows.name: declare-path-parameter-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Path() to declare a typed, validated path segment with constraints such as min/max.

flows.name: declare-query-parameter-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Query() to declare optional or required query string parameters with validation rules.

flows.name: declare-request-body-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Body() or a Pydantic model to declare a structured JSON request body with schema validation.

flows.name: declare-form-and-file-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Form() and File() or UploadFile to accept multipart form data and file uploads.

flows.name: declare-header-and-cookie-flow
flows.description: Developer uses Header() and Cookie() to extract and validate HTTP headers and cookies.

flows.name: validate-request-flow
flows.description: Framework validates path, query, header, body, and cookie values against declared types and constraints.

flows.name: handle-validation-error-flow
flows.description: Framework catches RequestValidationError and returns a 422 response with field-level error details.

flows.name: handle-http-exception-flow
flows.description: Developer raises HTTPException with a status code and detail; framework returns the appropriate error response.

flows.name: handle-websocket-validation-error-flow
flows.description: Framework catches WebSocket validation errors and closes the connection with an appropriate error message.

flows.name: customize-exception-handler-flow
flows.description: Developer registers a custom exception handler to override default error response formatting.

flows.name: encode-response-object-flow
flows.description: Framework uses jsonable_encoder to convert Pydantic models, datetimes, decimals, and enums to JSON-safe types.

flows.name: use-ujson-response-flow
flows.description: Developer selects UJSONResponse or ORJSONResponse for faster JSON serialization on high-throughput endpoints.

flows.name: filter-response-fields-flow
flows.description: Framework applies response_model include/exclude rules to strip fields before serializing the response.

flows.name: return-custom-response-flow
flows.description: Developer returns a custom Response subclass directly from an endpoint to control headers and media type.

flows.name: add-background-task-flow
flows.description: Developer injects BackgroundTasks and calls add_task() inside an endpoint to queue a function for post-response execution.

flows.name: run-background-task-flow
flows.description: Framework executes all queued background tasks after the response is sent to the client.

flows.name: pass-background-tasks-via-dependency-flow
flows.display_name: Pass Background Tasks Via Dependency Flow
flows.description: Developer passes BackgroundTasks through a dependency so shared logic can also enqueue tasks.

flows.name: create-sse-endpoint-flow
flows.description: Developer returns an EventSourceResponse from an endpoint to open a persistent SSE stream to the client.

flows.name: send-sse-event-flow
flows.description: Developer yields ServerSentEvent objects with data, event type, and ID fields to push updates to the client.

flows.name: format-sse-event-flow
flows.description: Framework formats a ServerSentEvent into the text/event-stream wire format before writing it to the response.

flows.name: connect-websocket-flow
flows.description: Client initiates a WebSocket handshake and the server accepts the connection on a declared WebSocket route.

flows.name: receive-websocket-message-flow
flows.description: Server reads text or binary messages sent by the connected client during an active WebSocket session.

flows.name: configure-lifespan-flow
flows.description: Developer provides a lifespan async context manager to run startup and shutdown logic around the app's lifetime.

flows.name: mount-sub-application-flow
flows.description: Developer mounts a sub-application or static files handler at a path prefix within the main FastAPI app.

flows.name: configure-middleware-flow
flows.description: Developer adds CORS, GZip, or custom ASGI middleware to the application to process every request and response.

flows.name: run-cli-flow
flows.description: Developer starts the FastAPI development server from the command line using the built-in CLI entry point.

flows.name: generate-openapi-schema-flow
flows.description: Framework introspects all registered routes and produces a complete OpenAPI 3.x JSON schema.

flows.name: view-swagger-ui-flow
flows.description: Developer or API consumer opens /docs in a browser to explore and try out endpoints interactively.

flows.name: customize-openapi-metadata-flow
flows.description: Developer sets title, version, description, and tags on the FastAPI app to enrich the generated OpenAPI document.

flows.name: mount-static-files-flow
flows.description: Developer mounts a StaticFiles instance at a path to serve CSS, JS, and image assets directly from disk.

flows.name: serve-html-page-flow
flows.description: Client requests an HTML page and the server returns a fully rendered Jinja2 template with dynamic content.

flows.name: send-test-request-flow
flows.description: Developer uses TestClient to send HTTP requests to the app in tests without running a live server.

flows.name: override-dependency-in-test-flow
flows.description: Developer uses app.dependency_overrides to replace real dependencies with test doubles during testing.

flows.name: register-http-route
flows.description: Developer registers an HTTP endpoint (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.) on the FastAPI application or router using decorator-based path operations.

flows.name: register-websocket-route
flows.description: Developer registers a WebSocket endpoint on the FastAPI application or router to handle real-time bidirectional connections.

flows.name: manage-items-flow
flows.description: CRUD operations for items including list, create, read, update, and delete.

flows.name: list-users-flow
flows.description: Retrieve all users from the system.

flows.name: user-items-flow
flows.description: Retrieve items belonging to the authenticated user.

flows.name: get-item-flow
flows.description: Retrieve a single item by ID.

flows.name: path-validation-flow
flows.description: Test path parameter validation with various type and constraint combinations.

flows.name: path-param-validation-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints validating integer path parameters with various constraints (gt, ge, lt, le).

flows.name: query-param-validation-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints validating query parameters with optional, required, typed, and list variants.

flows.name: response-class-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints using custom response classes for multiple routes.

flows.name: router-response-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints demonstrating response models across multiple router paths.

flows.name: dependency-cache-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for dependency caching behavior across request scopes.

flows.name: callable-dependency-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for callable class and method dependency injection patterns.

flows.name: context-manager-dependency-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for context manager dependency injection with error handling.

flows.name: dependency-override-flow
flows.description: Test routes for dependency override patterns across decorators and routers.

flows.name: partial-dependency-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for partial function dependency injection with sync/async and generator variants.

flows.name: wrapped-dependency-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for wrapped dependency injection with various sync/async and generator combinations.

flows.name: user-update-flow
flows.description: Update user records with database dependency handling.

flows.name: exception-handling-flow
flows.description: Test HTTP exception and error handling across multiple scenarios.

flows.name: file-form-upload-flow
flows.description: Handle multipart file and form data submission with various ordering and list scenarios.

flows.name: form-submission-flow
flows.description: Handle URL-encoded and multipart form data submissions.

flows.name: form-list-param-flow
flows.description: Handle form submissions with list parameters from various sequence types.

flows.name: form-model-flow
flows.description: Handle form submissions with Pydantic model validation and extra field handling.

flows.name: json-type-handling-flow
flows.description: Handle JSON type data in form, query, header, and cookie parameters.

flows.name: openapi-examples-flow
flows.description: Demonstrate OpenAPI examples in path, query, header, and cookie parameters.

flows.name: separate-schemas-flow
flows.description: Separate input and output schemas for item creation and retrieval.

flows.name: hidden-params-flow
flows.description: Access endpoints with hidden cookie, header, path, and query parameters.

flows.name: pydantic-v1-validation-flow
flows.description: Test error handling for Pydantic v1 models in various endpoint contexts.

flows.name: model-params-flow
flows.description: Access endpoints with query, header, and cookie model parameters.

flows.name: cookie-management-flow
flows.description: Set and manage cookies via direct and indirect routes.

flows.name: request-param-model-flow
flows.description: Validate and parse request parameters (query, header, cookie) using model aliases.

flows.name: response-alias-flow
flows.description: Serialize responses with field aliases in various formats (dict, model, list).

flows.name: serialize-items-flow
flows.description: Retrieve and serialize item responses with various validation modes.

flows.name: stream-items-flow
flows.description: Server-sent events and streaming endpoints for item data in various formats.

flows.name: url-convertor-flow
flows.description: Test endpoints for Starlette URL path parameter type conversion.

flows.name: stream-bare-type-flow
flows.description: Streaming endpoints with bare type annotations in async and sync variants.

flows.name: stream-validation-flow
flows.description: Stream JSON responses with validation error handling.

flows.name: stringified-annotation-flow
flows.description: Handle stringified type annotations and forward references.

flows.name: invoice-callbacks-flow
flows.description: Create invoices with webhook callback notifications.

flows.name: tuple-models-flow
flows.description: Handle tuple types in request bodies and forms.

flows.name: union-body-flow
flows.description: Accept union types in request bodies.

flows.name: response-validation-flow
flows.description: Validate response models and handle validation errors.

flows.name: upsert-item-flow
flows.description: Create or update an item by ID.

flows.name: update-item-flow
flows.description: Update an existing item.

flows.name: create-item-flow
flows.description: Create a new item.

flows.name: send-notification-flow
flows.description: Send a notification email with background task processing.

flows.name: manage-item-flow
flows.description: Retrieve and update item with partial updates via PATCH.

flows.name: read-user-flow
flows.description: Retrieve user information by username.

flows.name: list-items-with-cookies-flow
flows.description: List items with cookie-based parameters.

flows.name: serve-docs-ui-flow
flows.description: Serve custom documentation UI endpoints (Swagger, ReDoc, and user endpoints).

flows.name: compute-sum-flow
flows.description: Accept gzip-compressed POST requests to compute sums.

flows.name: timed-request-flow
flows.description: Measure and track request execution time.

flows.name: redirect-flow
flows.description: Handle HTTP redirects to external resources.

flows.name: stream-video-flow
flows.description: Stream video content as a response.

flows.name: common-parameters-flow
flows.description: Shared query parameters for items and users listing.

flows.name: list-items-flow
flows.description: Retrieve item listings with optional header parameters and metadata.

flows.name: manage-invoices-flow
flows.description: Create invoices and handle callback notifications for invoice events.

flows.name: get-item-by-id-flow
flows.description: Retrieve a specific item by its identifier.

flows.name: get-user-profile-flow
flows.description: Retrieve current user profile and user details by identifier.

flows.name: get-file-flow
flows.description: Retrieve a file by its path.

flows.name: get-model-flow
flows.description: Retrieve a model by its name.

flows.name: retrieve-items-flow
flows.description: Fetch items by ID with numeric path parameter validation.

flows.name: create-items-flow
flows.description: Create new items with Pydantic v1 compatibility validation.

flows.name: filter-items-flow
flows.description: List items with query parameter filtering and model-based validation.

flows.name: search-items-flow
flows.description: Search and retrieve items with string query parameter validation.

flows.name: upload-files-flow
flows.description: Handle file and upload file submissions.

flows.name: upload-file-flow
flows.description: Handle single file upload to server.
